a noncategorical web-film & flip book

STORIES of SANE

Some of the worst parts of one life, told through Sane — so that we might heal, and come together, and cure the root of these nightmares. It is a movie when watched, a wound when touched, a game when chosen.

THE RAW BOOK · 103 FOLIOS

REAL ART · CRAYON & MARKER

ABOUT

Stories of Sane — 10,000 Eyes

This is a single file that refuses one shape. Watch it and it is a film. Touch it and it is a wound. Choose, and the page chooses back. Read, and it is the raw book exactly as it was written in 2015.

The art is real — drawn in crayon and marker. The living face between the plates is its spirit: it breathes, its eyes spiral and X and fill with question marks, its mouth is sewn shut against the rule Don't Speak — until it breaks the rule to speak, scream, or laugh. As you move toward the cure, the cracks in the face fill with gold. (Kintsugi: the wound becomes the seam becomes the gold.)

Be a good neighbor.

How to move

FILM — the generative cinema. It re-cuts itself every time: a different path, a different visual language each beat, an escalating score. It never plays the same way twice. Press take the wheel any moment to step into Steer.
STEER — you choose; six forces accrue and shape the ending.
READ — every folio, searchable.
Keys: 1–9 choose · F film · S steer · R recut / read · M sound · B back · ⎋ exit.

Six forces: Witness · Light · Fire · Mercy · Together · Fracture.
Together + Mercy + Light feed the gold. There are no right paths. Only yours.

Lineage — 10,000 Eyes (web-film) · RQ-N · Cyberpunk Dao · Frank Lyon: The Blood Price · MindScape DOS Dungeon · Intra Locution. Built zero-dependency, single file, GitHub-Pages deployable.
